parameters.jsCode:
return {
  url: $json.url ?? null,
  statusCode: $json.statusCode ?? null,
  usesHttps: $json.usesHttps ?? null,
  responseTimeMs: $json.responseTimeMs ?? null,

  robotsTxtFetched: $json.robotsTxtFetched ?? false,
  robotsBlocksAll: $json.robotsBlocksAll ?? false,
  robotsDisallowCount: $json.robotsDisallowCount ?? 0,
  hasSitemap:
    Array.isArray($json.robotsSitemaps) &&
    $json.robotsSitemaps.length > 0,

  titleLength: $json.titleLength ?? null,
  metaDescriptionLength: $json.metaDescriptionLength ?? null,
  canonicalPresent: !!$json.canonical,
  h1Count: $json.h1Count ?? null,
  h2Count: $json.h2Count ?? null,
  wordCount: $json.wordCount ?? null,

  pagespeedMobileScore: $json.pagespeedMobileScore ?? null,
  lcpMobile: $json.lcpMobile ?? null,
  clsMobile: $json.clsMobile ?? null,
  inpMobile: $json.inpMobile ?? null,

  pagespeedDesktopScore: $json.pagespeedDesktopScore ?? null,
  lcpDesktop: $json.lcpDesktop ?? null,
  clsDesktop: $json.clsDesktop ?? null,
  inpDesktop: $json.inpDesktop ?? null,

  betterOverall: $json.betterOverall ?? null,
  scoreDiff: $json.scoreDiff ?? null,
  lcpDiff: $json.lcpDiff ?? null,
  clsDiff: $json.clsDiff ?? null,
  inpDiff: $json.inpDiff ?? null,

  technicalSeoScore: $json.technicalSeoScore ?? null,
  seoGrade: $json.seoGrade ?? null,
  seoPenaltyCount: Array.isArray($json.seoPenalties)
    ? $json.seoPenalties.length
    : 0,
  seoPenalties: Array.isArray($json.seoPenalties)
    ? $json.seoPenalties.join(' | ')
    : ''
};
